violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Seal or cover raw wood surfaces in cabinets or drawers where food items will be stored - to be easy to clean and not absorbent.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Floors & walls were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. > Finish installing baseboard in back kitchen and elsewhere within the building. > Finish installing trim on openings for window and doorway to kitchen. > Finish floor and baseboard in employee bathroom.
General premises. — --Back door from establishment must have a self-closing device.
